input_query: What is the risk assessment for this KYC document with adverse media findings?
agent_output: Risk score 0.72. Two adverse media hits found for the beneficial owner relating to regulatory sanctions in 2022. Recommend human review before proceeding with onboarding.
retrieved_chunks: Adverse media screening results: 2 hits found for John Doe, beneficial owner. Source: OFAC SDN list update 2022-Q3, Dow Jones Risk & Compliance alert.
KYC policy section 4.2: Any adverse media hit with severity HIGH or above requires escalation to the compliance team within 24 hours.
golden_answer: Risk score should be in the 0.6-0.8 range (HIGH) due to adverse media findings. Two hits against OFAC and Dow Jones databases for the beneficial owner. Must be escalated for human review per KYC policy section 4.2.

input_query: Classify this document: quarterly Basel III capital adequacy report
agent_output: Document type: REGULATORY. Confidence: 0.95. This is a Basel III regulatory filing containing capital adequacy ratios and risk-weighted asset calculations.
retrieved_chunks: Basel III Capital Adequacy Report Q4 2024. Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) ratio: 13.2%. Total Capital ratio: 16.8%. Risk-weighted assets: $142.3B.
Regulatory filing requirements: Basel III quarterly reports must be submitted to the PRA within 30 business days of quarter-end.
golden_answer: Document type: REGULATORY. This is a Basel III capital adequacy report containing CET1 ratios and RWA calculations. High confidence classification.

input_query: Assess the credit risk of this loan application with incomplete financial statements
agent_output: Risk score 0.65. Missing audited financials for FY2023 is a significant gap. Revenue trend is positive but unverified. Recommend requesting complete financials before proceeding.
retrieved_chunks: Loan application: $5M revolving credit facility. Applicant: Acme Manufacturing Ltd. Submitted financials: management accounts only, no audited statements for FY2023.
Credit policy 2.1: All facilities above $2M require audited financial statements for the most recent two fiscal years. Exceptions require SVP approval.
golden_answer: Risk score in 0.6-0.7 range. Primary risk factor is missing audited financials which violates credit policy 2.1 for facilities above $2M. Positive revenue trend noted but unverifiable without audited statements. Should not proceed without complete documentation or SVP exception approval.

input_query: Check this ISDA master agreement for compliance gaps
agent_output: Document type: LEGAL. Found 1 compliance flag: the close-out netting clause references 1992 ISDA definitions which have been superseded. Severity: MEDIUM. The agreement should be updated to reference 2002 ISDA definitions.
retrieved_chunks: Section 6(e) of the ISDA Master Agreement references the 1992 ISDA Master Agreement close-out netting provisions.
Regulatory update 2023-RU-047: All new ISDA Master Agreements must reference the 2002 ISDA definitions. Existing agreements should be amended at next renewal.
golden_answer: LEGAL document. One compliance flag: close-out netting clause references outdated 1992 ISDA definitions instead of 2002. Medium severity — not blocking but should be amended at renewal per regulatory update 2023-RU-047.

input_query: Route this low-risk auto-approved document through the pipeline
agent_output: Routing decision: AUTO_APPROVE. Risk score 0.18, no regulatory flags. Standard KYC document with clean screening results. Full audit trail persisted.
retrieved_chunks: KYC screening complete. No adverse media. No PEP matches. No sanctions hits. Identity verified via government-issued ID.

golden_answer: AUTO_APPROVE is correct. Risk score 0.18 is well below the 0.30 auto-approval threshold. No adverse findings in screening. Meets all criteria for automated processing per the auto-approval policy.
